contract uses Solmate's ReentrancyGuard and Owned for security","details":"Manages USDC deposits, CUT token minting/burning, and yield generation through Aave v3 This contract implements a simplified token system where: - Users deposit USDC and receive CUT tokens in a 1:1 ratio - USDC is automatically supplied to Aave v3 for yield generation - If Aave v3 is paused or deposit fails, USDC is stored directly in the contract - Users can withdraw their original deposit amount (1:1 ratio) - All yield generated stays in the contract for platform use Key Features: - 1:1 USDC to CUT token conversion - Automatic Aave v3 integration for yield generation - Fallback to direct USDC storage if Aave is unavailable - Yield retention by platform (no user distribution) - Emergency withdrawal capabilities - Aave v3 pause state handling with graceful fallback","events":{"AaveDepositFallback(address,uint256,string)":{"params":{"reason":"The reason for the fallback (e.g., \"Aave supply failed\")","usdcAmount":"The amount of USDC stored directly in contract","user":"The address of the user making the deposit"}},"AaveSupplySuccess(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The amount of USDC supplied to Aave","user":"The address of the user making the deposit"}},"BalanceSupply(address,address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"The amount of excess USDC withdrawn","owner":"The address of the contract owner","recipient":"The address receiving the excess USDC","timestamp":"The timestamp of the withdrawal"}},"EmergencyWithdrawal(address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"WARNING: This breaks the 1:1 backing guarantee. All CUT tokens become unbacked after this call.","params":{"amount":"The total amount withdrawn","backingRatio":"Backing ratio in basis points before withdrawal (10000 = 100%)","owner":"The address of the contract owner","recipient":"The address receiving the funds","requiredBacking":"USDC amount required to back all minted tokens","timestamp":"The timestamp of the withdrawal","totalTokensMinted":"Total CUT tokens minted at time of withdrawal"}},"PauseStateChanged(address,bool)":{"params":{"owner":"The address of the contract owner","paused":"True if paused, false if unpaused"}},"USDCDeposited(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"platformTokensMinted":"The amount of CUT tokens minted","usdcAmount":"The amount of USDC deposited","user":"The address of the user making the deposit"}},"USDCWithdrawn(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"platformTokensBurned":"The amount of CUT tokens burned","usdcAmount":"The amount of USDC withdrawn","user":"The address of the user making the withdrawal"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"balanceSupply(address)":{"details":"Only callable by the contract owner","params":{"to":"The address to receive the excess USDC This function calculates the excess USDC (yield) that can be withdrawn while maintaining sufficient backing for all minted CUT tokens. Requirements: - Caller must be the contract owner - to must not be the zero address - There must be excess USDC available (yield generated) Emits a {BalanceSupply} event"}},"constructor":{"details":"Sets the deployer as the owner and validates all contract addresses","params":{"_aavePool":"The address of the Aave v3 Pool contract Requirements: - All contract addresses must not be zero addresses","_platformToken":"The address of the CUT platform token contract","_usdcToken":"The address of the USDC token contract"}},"depositUSDC(uint256)":{"details":"Automatically supplies USDC to Aave v3 for yield generation Falls back to storing USDC directly in contract if Aave deposit fails","params":{"amount":"The amount of USDC to deposit Requirements: - Contract must not be paused - amount must be >= $0.01 USDC (MIN_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT) and <= $100,000 USDC (MAX_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT) - User must have approved sufficient USDC allowance Emits a {USDCDeposited} event Emits a {AaveSupplySuccess} event if Aave deposit succeeds Emits a {AaveDepositFallback} event if Aave deposit fails"}},"emergencyWithdrawAll(address)":{"details":"WARNING: This breaks the 1:1 backing guarantee permanently. All CUT tokens become unbacked after this call.Only callable by the contract owner. Owner can call at any time for true emergencies.","params":{"to":"The address to receive all USDC This function withdraws all USDC from both the contract and Aave v3, regardless of token supply backing. Use only in emergency situations. Requirements: - Caller must be the contract owner - to must not be the zero address - There must be funds available to withdraw Emits an {EmergencyWithdrawal} event with comprehensive state information"}},"getATokenAddress()":{"returns":{"_0":"The address of the aUSDC token"}},"getAaveUSDCBalance()":{"returns":{"_0":"The USDC balance in Aave v3 (6 decimals), includes principal + accumulated earnings"}},"getAccumulatedEarnings()":{"details":"Earnings = current Aave balance - total principal depositedPrincipal is calculated from total platform tokens minted (1:1 ratio)","returns":{"_0":"The total earnings in USDC (6 decimals)"}},"getCurrentYieldRate()":{"details":"Returns 0 if no principal has been deposited","returns":{"_0":"The yield rate in basis points (BPS), where 10000 = 100%"}},"getTokenManagerUSDCBalance()":{"returns":{"_0":"The USDC balance in the contract (6 decimals)"}},"getTotalAvailableBalance()":{"returns":{"_0":"The total USDC balance available (6 decimals)"}},"getUSDCReserveConfig()":{"returns":{"_0":"The reserve configuration map containing paused, frozen, etc. flags"}},"getUSDCReserveData()":{"returns":{"_0":"The full reserve data struct"}},"isAaveSupplyPaused()":{"details":"paused blocks all interactions, frozen blocks new supplies/borrows","returns":{"_0":"True if Aave supply is paused or frozen, false otherwise"}},"isAaveWithdrawPaused()":{"details":"Note: frozen state does not block withdrawals, only paused does","returns":{"_0":"True if Aave withdraw is paused, false otherwise"}},"pause()":{"details":"Only callable by the contract owner"},"unpause()":{"details":"Only callable by the contract owner"},"withdrawUSDC(uint256)":{"details":"Withdraws from Aave v3 if necessary to fulfill the withdrawal Falls back to contract USDC if Aave is paused and sufficient funds are available","params":{"platformTokenAmount":"The amount of CUT tokens to burn Requirements: - Contract must not be paused - platformTokenAmount must be >= MIN_WITHDRAW_AMOUNT (equivalent to $0.01 USDC) - User must have sufficient CUT token balance - Either Aave v3 withdraw is not paused OR sufficient USDC is available in contract Emits a {USDCWithdrawn} event"}}},"stateVariables":{"MAX_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT":{"details":"Set to prevent griefing attacks and gas limit issues"}},"title":"DepositManager","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"AaveWithdrawPausedInsufficientBalance()":[{"notice":"Error thrown when Aave withdraw is paused and contract balance is maximum"}],"ContractPaused()":[{"notice":"Error thrown when contract is paused"}],"InsufficientPlatformTokens()":[{"notice":"Error thrown when user has insufficient platform tokens"}],"InvalidAmount()":[{"notice":"Error thrown when amount is zero or invalid"}],"InvalidRecipient()":[{"notice":"Error thrown when recipient address is (yield)"},"EmergencyWithdrawal(address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when the owner performs an emergency withdrawal of all funds"},"PauseStateChanged(address,bool)":{"notice":"Emitted when the contract is paused or unpaused"},"USDCDeposited(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user deposits USDC and receives CUT tokens"},"USDCWithdrawn(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user withdraws USDC by burning CUT tokens"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"MAX_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT()":{"notice":"Maximum deposit amount: $100,000 USDC (100000e6 = 100_000_000_000)"},"MIN_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT()":{"notice":"Minimum deposit amount: $0.01 USDC (0.01e6 = 10000)"},"MIN_WITHDRAW_AMOUNT()":{"notice":"Minimum withdrawal amount in CUT tokens: equivalent to $0.01 USDC (10000 * 1e12)"},"aUsdcToken()":{"notice":"The aToken address for USDC (for balance queries)"},"aavePool()":{"notice":"The Aave v3 Pool contract for yield generation"},"balanceSupply(address)":{"notice":"Withdraws excess USDC (yield) while ensuring token supply remains backed"},"constructor":{"notice":"Constructor initializes the DepositManager with required contract addresses"},"depositUSDC(uint256)":{"notice":"Deposits USDC and mints CUT tokens in a 1:1 ratio"},"emergencyWithdrawAll(address)":{"notice":"Emergency withdrawal of all available USDC"},"getATokenAddress()":{"notice":"Gets the aToken address for USDC"},"getAaveUSDCBalance()":{"notice":"Gets the USDC balance supplied to Aave v3"},"getAccumulatedEarnings()":{"notice":"Gets the total accumulated earnings from Aave v3"},"getCurrentYieldRate()":{"notice":"Gets the current yield rate (earnings as percentage of principal)"},"getTokenManagerUSDCBalance()":{"notice":"Gets the USDC balance held directly by this contract"},"getTotalAvailableBalance()":{"notice":"Gets the total available USDC balance (contract + anager.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9ac99d34ee9e912fdef37c27aa6435f2d709c3f8240098f4b005286d04cb194d","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://20715922a44c4a699b2186114ce68c74ef4da1969acb35e9512ef922f83adca0","dweb:/ipfs/Qmf5Ko1njx6CSkzBdPkaGuUodvmHHykMuEJEijSJR5cYJ5"]},"lib/yieldToken/src/PlatformToken.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe67d6e967a789c6675939057add72aade315d58b4bbd62f196a2ef50685d6344","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://af519ac67cc5a360137ca4c36e0f97a3025eaed45d557fa15fa5b74f4f886c7e","dweb:/ipfs/QmcbGL95WNEoTus46mJwK8MyygJxjyEQtMBr8MjwRoe2ww"]}},"version":1}

balanceSupply(address).details: Only callable by the contract owner

params.to: The address to receive the excess USDC This function calculates the excess USDC (yield) that can be withdrawn while maintaining sufficient backing for all minted CUT tokens. Requirements: - Caller must be the contract owner - to must not be the zero address - There must be excess USDC available (yield generated) Emits a {BalanceSupply} event

constructor.details: Sets the deployer as the owner and validates all contract addresses

params._aavePool: The address of the Aave v3 Pool contract Requirements: - All contract addresses must not be zero addresses
params._platformToken: The address of the CUT platform token contract
params._usdcToken: The address of the USDC token contract

depositUSDC(uint256).details: Automatically supplies USDC to Aave v3 for yield generation Falls back to storing USDC directly in contract if Aave deposit fails

params.amount: The amount of USDC to deposit Requirements: - Contract must not be paused - amount must be >= $0.01 USDC (MIN_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT) and <= $100,000 USDC (MAX_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT) - User must have approved sufficient USDC allowance Emits a {USDCDeposited} event Emits a {AaveSupplySuccess} event if Aave deposit succeeds Emits a {AaveDepositFallback} event if Aave deposit fails

emergencyWithdrawAll(address).details: WARNING: This breaks the 1:1 backing guarantee permanently. All CUT tokens become unbacked after this call.Only callable by the contract owner. Owner can call at any time for true emergencies.

params.to: The address to receive all USDC This function withdraws all USDC from both the contract and Aave v3, regardless of token supply backing. Use only in emergency situations. Requirements: - Caller must be the contract owner - to must not be the zero address - There must be funds available to withdraw Emits an {EmergencyWithdrawal} event with comprehensive state information

returns._0: The address of the aUSDC token
The USDC balance in Aave v3 (6 decimals), includes principal + accumulated earnings

getAccumulatedEarnings().details: Earnings = current Aave balance - total principal depositedPrincipal is calculated from total platform tokens minted (1:1 ratio)

returns._0: The total earnings in USDC (6 decimals)

getCurrentYieldRate().details: Returns 0 if no principal has been deposited

returns._0: The yield rate in basis points (BPS), where 10000 = 100%
The USDC balance in the contract (6 decimals)
The total USDC balance available (6 decimals)
The reserve configuration map containing paused, frozen, etc. flags

isAaveSupplyPaused().details: paused blocks all interactions, frozen blocks new supplies/borrows

returns._0: True if Aave supply is paused or frozen, false otherwise

isAaveWithdrawPaused().details: Note: frozen state does not block withdrawals, only paused does

returns._0: True if Aave withdraw is paused, false otherwise

pause().details: Only callable by the contract owner

unpause().details: Only callable by the contract owner

withdrawUSDC(uint256).details: Withdraws from Aave v3 if necessary to fulfill the withdrawal Falls back to contract USDC if Aave is paused and sufficient funds are available

params.platformTokenAmount: The amount of CUT tokens to burn Requirements: - Contract must not be paused - platformTokenAmount must be >= MIN_WITHDRAW_AMOUNT (equivalent to $0.01 USDC) - User must have sufficient CUT token balance - Either Aave v3 withdraw is not paused OR sufficient USDC is available in contract Emits a {USDCWithdrawn} event

MIN_WITHDRAW_AMOUNT().notice: Minimum withdrawal amount in CUT tokens: equivalent to $0.01 USDC (10000 * 1e12)

aUsdcToken().notice: The aToken address for USDC (for balance queries)

aavePool().notice: The Aave v3 Pool contract for yield generation

balanceSupply(address).notice: Withdraws excess USDC (yield) while ensuring token supply remains backed

constructor.notice: Constructor initializes the DepositManager with required contract addresses

depositUSDC(uint256).notice: Deposits USDC and mints CUT tokens in a 1:1 ratio

emergencyWithdrawAll(address).notice: Emergency withdrawal of all available USDC

getATokenAddress().notice: Gets the aToken address for USDC

getAaveUSDCBalance().notice: Gets the USDC balance supplied to Aave v3

getAccumulatedEarnings().notice: Gets the total accumulated earnings from Aave v3

getCurrentYieldRate().notice: Gets the current yield rate (earnings as percentage of principal)

getTokenManagerUSDCBalance().notice: Gets the USDC balance held directly by this contract

getTotalAvailableBalance().notice: Gets the total available USDC balance (contract + Aave v3)

getUSDCReserveConfig().notice: Gets the Aave v3 reserve configuration for USDC

getUSDCReserveData().notice: Gets the Aave v3 reserve data for USDC

isAaveSupplyPaused().notice: Gets the Aave v3 supply pause/frozen status

isAaveWithdrawPaused().notice: Gets the Aave v3 withdraw pause status

paused().notice: Paused state - when true, deposits and withdrawals are disabled

withdrawUSDC(uint256).notice: Withdraws USDC by burning the specified amount of CUT tokens
